induction_input: The cake the chef baked disappeared.
The bridge the engineer designed collapsed.
The report the manager reviewed circulated.
The law the senator proposed failed.
The book the student borrowed vanished.
induced_prompt_raw: Write sentences using a center-embedded reduced relative clause: "The [noun] the [person] [transitive verb] [intransitive verb]."
induced_prompt: Write sentences using a center-embedded reduced relative clause: "The [noun] the [person] [transitive verb] [intransitive verb]."
l2_sentences: The cake the baker made disappeared.
The letter the lawyer wrote arrived.
The painting the artist created sold.
The bridge the engineer designed collapsed.
The book the student read survived.
l1_sentences: The cake the chef baked disappeared.
The bridge the engineer designed collapsed.
The report the manager reviewed circulated.
The law the senator proposed failed.
The book the student borrowed vanished.
